_note: Stack policy from the measured with/without ladder (2026-07-12): rung E1 excludes the 31 frames flagged by pooled defect-side robust z >= 3.5 over all 240 frames' registration regdata (30 deep-cloud-band frames, bg z +3.6..+7.3; frame 1, fwhm z +9.5 defocus/settling). Control E0 (no exclusion) measured BETTER on sky noise (2.853 vs 3.065 MAD, the sqrt-N prediction) but carried coherent cloud residue rejection could not remove (the band dwelt over one sky region long enough to be the per-pixel majority: diff structure 3.7 c16, gate rings at-bound 8.0); E1 restores the margin (rings 6.6) and is the smallest defect-free exclusion. Render knobs track GENERIC (no approved look yet). Stack build: partitioned selfflat route, pinned ref n=120, coverage crop — the byte-reproduce command lives in NOTES STATUS.
